creative_brief: Show diverse families at a warm, welcoming hub collection point, with farmers' photos/stories visible on product displays.
primary_text: Do you ever feel like you're the only one who cares where your food actually comes from? You're not. There's a whole community of families who've moved beyond supermarket guesswork to farm-direct groceries. Real farmers, real stories, real food you can collect from your nearest hub.
headline: Do you care where your food comes from?
description: Join families choosing farm-direct groceries. Collect from local hubs, skip the supermarket guesswork.
